reviews.review_title: Excellent physics make this a real stea!
reviews.review_description: A ball. A hoop. And great physics. Perfect for shooting some casual hoops in your own front room. Would love higher frame rate and better ball model, but not a dealbreaker at this price. Highly recommend.
Great MR hoops experience. I've tried similar games and they tend to be "overengineered". This one is beautiful in it's simplicity. Easily recommended!
